definition: A person who treats sick people
example: I need to see a doctor.

definition: A substance used to treat illness
example: Take this medicine twice a day.

definition: A sign that you have a particular illness
example: Fever is a common symptom of the flu.

definition: A pain in your head
example: I have a terrible headache.

definition: Physical activity to stay healthy
example: Regular exercise is good for your heart.

definition: The food you eat regularly
example: A balanced diet includes vegetables and fruit.

definition: How heavy someone or something is
example: I've gained some weight this year.

definition: A planned meeting with a doctor
example: I have a dental appointment at 3 p.m.

definition: A doctor's written order for medicine
example: The doctor gave me a prescription.

definition: A bad reaction to something (food, pollen, etc.)
example: I have an allergy to peanuts.

definition: To get well after an illness
example: She recovered from the flu in a week.

definition: To hurt part of your body
example: He injured his knee playing football.

definition: To give medical care for an illness
example: The doctor treated the wound.

definition: In good physical condition
example: She looks very healthy.

definition: Not well; ill
example: I feel sick today.

definition: In good physical condition from exercise
example: He goes to the gym to stay fit.

definition: A bad physical feeling in your body
example: I have pain in my back.

definition: A vehicle that takes sick people to hospital
example: Call an ambulance — he's hurt!

definition: A medical operation
example: She had surgery on her knee.

definition: Worry and pressure that affects your health
example: Work can cause a lot of stress.
